abilities.name: Dark Deception
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a Shadow Door marker within 2" to reduce the damage dealt by 3.

abilities.name: Ungentlemanly Affairs
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model suffers damage from an enemy attack during which this model did not cheat fate, draw a card.

actions.name: Runic Siphon
actions.effects: The target and enemy models within (r)2" of the target gain an Entranced token. For each raise this action receives, increase the range of the (r) by 2".

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Fall into Darkness
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with a Shadow Door marker within 6".

actions.name: Intercision
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a friendly Shadow Door marker within 3" of an enemy model.
actions.effects: Summon a DUA model in base contact with the target. Then, remove the target.

actions.name: Black Soulstone
actions.effects: Make a Shadow Door marker within range. Enemy models within (r)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

actions.name: Shadows Loom
actions.effects: Move the target up to 6" in any direction, ignoring models.

triggers.name: Twilight Aid
triggers.text: Once per activation. Allies moved through this way heal 2.

triggers.name: Cut Them Down
triggers.text: The target may declare a (r) action.
